ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun, via ZOOM, counsel for John Palacios, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that the court is inclined to require a full bond in this matter to protect any potential creditors. Counsel reports that the two trustees filed waivers of bond to keep costs low and is unaware of any creditors.

After additional discussion, the court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. John Ignacio Palacios is appointed Administrator of the Estate with full authority. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
